▼ Security notice — please read before using

API Key Protection
Create a temporary restricted API key with a low usage limit specifically for this session.


Data Privacy
Your photos go directly to OpenAI's API. Nothing passes through any other server.


Session Security
Your key lives only in browser memory and is cleared when you close this tab.
